docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-29-2016 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
